messages_total.description: Gmail's real wire type is a JSON integer. Sourced via a bare computed_fields camelCase-to-snake_case rename ("{{ record.messagesTotal }}"), which now preserves the native JSON type (gap-loop cycle-1 typed computed_fields extraction) rather than stringifying it; see docs.md Known limits.

messages_unread.description: Same as messages_total; see docs.md Known limits.

threads_total.description: Same as messages_total; see docs.md Known limits.

threads_unread.description: Same as messages_total; see docs.md Known limits.
